task_completion.description: Open the input Landsat GeoTIFF file in the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'landsat_multispectral.tif' or 'landsat_multispectral' is visible in the Product Explorer or main application window.

task_completion.description: Modify the properties of Band 1 to match specifications.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A properties dialog or table showing Band 1 renamed to 'SWIR_1', with Wavelength '1650.0', Unit 'reflectance', and No-Data Value '0.0' enabled.

task_completion.description: Modify the properties of Band 2 to match specifications.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A properties dialog or table showing Band 2 renamed to 'NIR', with Wavelength '865.0', Unit 'reflectance', and No-Data Value '0.0' enabled.

task_completion.description: Modify the properties of Band 3 to match specifications.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A properties dialog or table showing Band 3 renamed to 'Red', with Wavelength '655.0', Unit 'reflectance', and No-Data Value '0.0' enabled.

task_completion.description: Modify the properties of Band 4 to match specifications.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A properties dialog or table showing Band 4 renamed to 'Green', with Wavelength '560.0', Unit 'reflectance', and No-Data Value '0.0' enabled.

task_completion.description: Save or export the enriched product in BEAM-DIMAP format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save or export dialog showing the destination path '/home/ga/snap_exports/landsat_restored_metadata.dim' and the format selected as BEAM-DIMAP.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface of the SNAP application to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with SNAP's Product Explorer, Band Properties dialogs, and Export/Save menus, rather than terminal commands executing scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected output or metadata into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The metadata modifications are clearly visible within the SNAP application's specific property fields, not in a generic text editor.

integrity.description: The agent exported the file using the application's export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The export dialog is from the SNAP application, showing the correct path and BEAM-DIMAP format selection.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Input file: /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. Expected output: /home/ga/snap_exports/landsat_restored_metadata.dim. Band properties to verify: SWIR_1 (1650.0 nm), NIR (865.0 nm), Red (655.0 nm), Green (560.0 nm). All bands must have unit 'reflectance' and No-Data Value 0.0 enabled.
